zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax於1215年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧時，他的父親Foulques III de PAYNEL Seigneur de Hambye45歲，母親Alice d'Aubigny34歲。他和Janne Philippa de COURCY至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1272年在法國諾門迪曼其哈白享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: PAYNEL
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax was born in 1215, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Foulques III de PAYNEL Seigneur de Hambye, was 45 and his mother, Alice d'Aubigny, was 34. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Janne Philippa de COURCY. He died in 1272, in Hambye, Manche, Normandy, France, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax est né en 1215, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Foulques III de PAYNEL Seigneur de Hambye, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alice d'Aubigny, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Janne Philippa de COURCY. Il est décédé en 1272, à Hambye, Manche, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax 1215 in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Foulques III de PAYNEL Seigneur de Hambye 45 und seine Mutter Alice d'Aubigny 34. Er hatte mit Janne Philippa de COURCY mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1272 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax è nato il nel 1215 nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Foulques III de PAYNEL Seigneur de Hambye, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Alice d'Aubigny, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Janne Philippa de COURCY. Morì nel 1272, nel Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Draxが1215年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで生まれた時，父Foulques III de PAYNEL Seigneur de Hambyeは45歳，母Alice d'Aubignyは34歳であった。彼はJanne Philippa de COURCYとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1272年にフランスノーマンディマンチェハンブイで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax(이)가 1215년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Foulques III de PAYNEL Seigneur de Hambye(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice d'Aubigny(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Janne Philippa de COURCY(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 햄비에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax nasceu em 1215, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Foulques III de PAYNEL Seigneur de Hambye, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alice d'Aubigny, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Janne Philippa de COURCY. Ele faleceu em 1272, em Hambye, Manche, Normandie, França, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax родился в 1215 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Foulques III de PAYNEL Seigneur de Hambye было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice d'Aubigny, 34. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Janne Philippa de COURCY. Он умер в 1272 г. в местности хамби, манч, норманди, Франция в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax nació en 1215, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Foulques III de PAYNEL Seigneur de Hambye, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Alice d'Aubigny, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Janne Philippa de COURCY. Murió en 1272, en Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 57 años.
